---
title: "People"
---

## Current Students

::: {.people-grid}

::: {.person}

[![](images/Marie%20Launay.jpg){.profile-img}](people/marie.qmd)

### Marie Launay
*PhD Student*

:::

::: {.person}

[![](images/Amanda%20Round.jpg){.profile-img}](people/amanda.qmd)

### Amanda Round
*MSc Student*

:::

::: {.person}

[![](images/Natasha.png){.profile-img}](people/natasha.qmd)

### Natasha Berghuis
*MSc Student*

:::

:::

<br><br><br>

## Alumni

::: {.people-grid}

::: {.person}

[![](images/Anthony%20Gagliano.png){.profile-img}](people/Anthony.qmd)

### Anthony Gagliano
*MSc Student*

:::

::: {.person}

[![](images/JoeSS.gif){.profile-img}](people/Joe.qmd)

### Joe Sánchez Schacht
*MSc Student*

:::

::: {.person}

[![](images/JM.jpg){.profile-img}](people/Juliano.qmd)

### Juliano Malizia
*BSc (Hons) Student*

:::

::: {.person}

[![](images/JDiam.jpg){.profile-img}](people/Jonathan.qmd)

### Jonathan Diamond
*BSc Student*

:::

:::
